mapper.sql: id, course_id, teaching_mode, stage_name, day_number, content_object_key, content_file_name, status, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into course_homework_template (course_id, teaching_mode, stage_name, day_number, content_object_key, content_file_name, status, remark, created_at, updated_at) values (#{courseId}, #{teachingMode}, #{stageName}, #{dayNumber}, #{contentObjectKey}, #{contentFileName}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update course_homework_template set teaching_mode = #{teachingMode}, stage_name = #{stageName}, day_number = #{dayNumber}, content_object_key = #{contentObjectKey}, content_file_name = #{contentFileName}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
